summary: The provided evidence contains no information specifically evaluating the efficacy or advantages of tapered versus parallel preparations or cemented versus screw-retained systems in mandibular molars. As a result, based solely on available documentation, there is insufficient support to determine which prefabricated post system is clinically preferable.
